data.name: 我在女子監獄開後宮
data.detailed_description:
◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事

拜歐雷特女子監獄",專門收容犯了罪的女性罪犯來統一管理的監獄,而我則是這裡的"典獄官".

沒有搞錯吧???我父親居然把我送到這裡來???這是怎麼一回事啊!!!
在我的理解裡面,監獄不都是男性嗎?而且就算是女子監獄…..
為什麼會找上我??

◆玩法

遊戲主要玩法是擔任女子監獄的管理,和監獄的女囚以及典獄長一起生活.可以探索她們的私生活,也可以了解這整間監獄背後的真相
遊戲總共有六個女孩可以攻略

能夠分別和她們親近關係,也可以服從典獄長的命令好好工作
或者收集夠足夠證據來舉報典獄長,成為監獄的真正支配者.
在這種環境當中,當然是有很多的限制以及規範.

你如果違反了典獄長的意見,很有可能就會受到典獄長的愛的教育…..
你是要服從典獄長好好工作,對眼前的女孩們只能看不能做什麼?還是違抗典獄長的命令和女孩們一起享受美好時光呢?

◆遊戲特色

◇15張基本CG，包含差分100張以上。

◇6位女角可以攻略。
◇遊戲文字7萬字。

data.short_description: 有天,你被調動到一座女子監獄中,負責管理監獄中女囚的生活,管理並且探索這些女孩們內心的秘密, 共有六位女孩可以攻略…
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 泰文, 韓文, 法文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Woman's Prison
data.detailed_description:
◆Featured Systems

◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.

◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

◆Story

"Baioret Women's Prison" was a prison for female criminals who had committed crimes, and I was the highest official here, the "warden".

I just could not believe it! My father actually sent me here? What the hell was going on here!!!
In my understanding, isn’t the prison all male? And even if it was a women's prison .....
Why was it me?

◆Play Methods

The main game method is to act as the management of the women's prison, and the female inmates of the prison and the warden live together. You can explore their private lives and learn the truth behind this entire prison.
There are a total of six girls to be explored in the game.

You can get close to each of them, or you can obey the warden's orders and work well.
Or collect enough evidence to report to the warden and become the real ruler of the prison.
In this environment, of course, there are many restrictions and regulations.

If you disobey the warden, you are likely to receive the love education from the warden .....
Are you going to obey the warden and do your job, and only see and not do anything with the girls in front of you? Or do you want to disobey the warden's order and enjoy a good time with the girls?

◆Game Features

◇15 basic CGs, including more than 100 differences

◇6 female characters available.
◇The game text is 70,000 words.

data.short_description: One day you were dispatched to a women's prison to take charge of the lives of the female prisoners and explore the inner secrets of those girls. There are six girls to be explored.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Thai, Korean, French, German, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
